rule_text: AP Government servants who start a work WITHOUT sanctioned estimate or adequate funds, except under written order from a higher authority OR under emergency provisions of Article 170, are PERSONALLY RESPONSIBLE for paying for the work done if their action is found not justified by exceptional circumstances.
verification_method: Check tender file: written sanction OR Article-170 emergency record exists before work-start; otherwise audit-callable as personal liability

rule_text: Emergency-start of an AP work (e.g., breaching of irrigation bund) without prior estimate is permitted; the Government servant on the spot must report immediately to immediate superior and Accountant-General; if a contractor cannot be formally engaged, a written order signed by the Government servant AND the contractor at the earliest opportunity is sufficient; formal estimate and written agreement must be prepared as expeditiously as possible thereafter.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND ProcurementMethod=Emergency
verification_method: For emergency work-starts: check immediate-report record + signed work-order + post-event sanction & formal agreement
